briefdescription.para: This macro returns the XSdiAud operating mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud core instance.

briefdescription.para: This macro returns the XSdiAud UHD-SDI standard.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud core instance.

simplesect.para: UHD-SDI standard 0: 3G SDI 1: 6G SDI 2: 12G SDI 8DS 3: 12G SDI 16DS

briefdescription.para: This macro returns the XSdiAud Channel field of the GUI register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud core instance.

simplesect.para: Channel field of the GUI register i.e. a value in between 0 to 7

memberdef.name: XSdiAud_Embed_RegMap
memberdef.initializer: = { {XSDIAUD_INT_EN_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, {XSDIAUD_INT_STS_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, {XSDIAUD_EMB_VID_CNTRL_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, {XSDIAUD_AUD_CNTRL_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, {XSDIAUD_VALID_CH_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_VALID_CH_CNT}, {XSDIAUD_MUTE_CH_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, {XSDIAUD_ACT_GRP_PRES_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, {XSDIAUD_ACT_CH_STAT_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, {XSDIAUD_SR_STAT_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, {XSDIAUD_ASX_STAT_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, }

memberdef.name: XSdiAud_Extract_RegMap
memberdef.initializer: = { {XSDIAUD_INT_EN_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, {XSDIAUD_INT_STS_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, {XSDIAUD_AUD_CNTRL_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, {XSDIAUD_VALID_CH_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_VALID_CH_CNT}, {XSDIAUD_MUTE_CH_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, {XSDIAUD_ACT_GRP_PRES_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, {XSDIAUD_EXT_FIFO_OVFLW_ST_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, {XSDIAUD_ACT_CH_STAT_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, {XSDIAUD_SR_STAT_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, {XSDIAUD_ASX_STAT_REG_OFFSET, XSDIAUD_DEFAULT_VALUE}, }

briefdescription.para: Runs a self-test on the driver/device.

detaileddescription.para: The self-test reads the XSdi_Aud registers and verifies the value.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSdiAud instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful i.e. if the self test passes.
XST_FAILURE if unsuccessful i.e. if the self test fails
